# Shadewater Labs Website - AI Agent Instructions

## Project Overview
Standalone portfolio and project hub for **shadewaterlabs.com** — the Labs division of Brin Shadewater's online presence. Separate from brinshadewater.com (creator/stream/community site). Showcases AI tools, coding projects, and tech experiments.

**Stack:** React 19, Vite 7, TypeScript 5.9, Tailwind CSS 4, lucide-react, local shadcn-style Button component.
**Router:** Custom SPA router — `src/App.tsx` (route switching) + `src/lib/routes.ts` (helpers, constants).
**Deployment:** Vercel, live at https://shadewaterlabs.com/

## Active Routes
```
/                      → ShadewaterLabs (main landing)
/projects              → Projects listing
/websites              → Managed web properties
/tech-news             → AI/tech notes feed
/shadewater-seo-report → Project page (via LabsProjectPage)
/webp-me-daddy         → Project page (via LabsProjectPage)
/inkmaster-studio      → Project page (via LabsProjectPage)
```
Vercel rewrites all non-file routes to `index.html` (see `vercel.json`).

## Key Files
- `src/App.tsx` — route switching logic
- `src/lib/routes.ts` — `LABS_ORIGIN`, `buildRouteHref`, `parseLocation`, `buildCanonicalUrl`
- `src/lib/seo.ts` — JSON-LD schema + Open Graph meta helpers
- `src/lib/brandAssets.ts` — logo src/srcset/dimensions constants
- `src/components/LabsProjectPage.tsx` — shared template for all three project detail pages
- `src/content/projects.ts` — project catalog data
- `src/content/websites.ts` — managed websites data
- `src/content/techNews.ts` — tech news feed data

## Design System
```css
--background: hsl(210 66% 7%)       /* Deep navy */
--seo-accent: #7dc9cf               /* Teal highlight */
--seo-sandstone: #d6bf94            /* Warm sandstone */
--foreground: #eef0eb               /* Warm off-white */
```
- **Headings:** Cormorant Garamond (serif)
- **UI/Body:** Space Grotesk (sans-serif)
- Dark, nautical-lab aesthetic — deep navy backgrounds, teal accents, sandstone warmth
- Rounded cards, subtle gradients, minimal borders

## Core Rules

### DO NOT modify routing without understanding the custom router
`src/App.tsx` uses `parseLocation` to map URL paths to page names. Add new routes in both `routes.ts` and `App.tsx`.

### DO NOT refactor working code
If it works, leave it alone. No "cleanup" unless requested.

### DO NOT introduce new libraries
Use only existing dependencies. Check `package.json` before importing anything new.

### DO NOT hardcode copy in JSX
Content belongs in `src/content/` data files. Components consume it.

### Generated files — do not edit directly
These are regenerated by `npm run dev` / `npm run build` via sync scripts:
- `src/content/generated/shadewaterSeoSkillSnapshot.ts`
- `public/shadewater-seo-report-explainer.html` / `.pdf`
- `public/webp-me-daddy-explainer.pdf`
- `public/inkmaster-studio-explainer.pdf`

## Brin-Era Remnants (Being Pruned)
Some files from the original Brin Shadewater site still exist in the codebase but are NOT routed or active in the Labs site:
- `src/pages/` — Home, About, Stream, Notes, PostDetail, Community (all orphaned)
- `src/lib/routes.ts` — still contains some Brin route constants
- `src/index.css` — may contain Brin-specific CSS classes
- `public/` — some Brin-era images still present

Do not add new references to these orphaned files. They are being removed.

## Coding Style
- TypeScript throughout — explicit prop interfaces
- Tailwind utility classes over custom CSS
- Mobile-first responsive design
- Small, readable components
- No over-engineering

## When Unsure
Ask for clarification. Never assume future requirements or guess at Brin site behaviour.
